top_signals.title: Two Saudi Crude Tankers Turn Around After Houthi Threats
top_signals.summary: Two oil tankers carrying Saudi crude to Asia reversed course in the Red Sea on Tuesday after threats from Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthis, as a widening Middle East conflict disrupted shipping through two of the world's most critical energy chokepoints.The diversions came as U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB selects 36 payment service providers to join digital euro pilot
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: OpenAI, Anthropic boost lobbying as legacy tech and defense spending slips
top_signals.summary: The two AI developers spent a combined $3.17 million in the second quarter, up 23% from the first three months of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says it's time to look beyond tech as AI uncertainty rattles the market
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer says the AI trade has become too unpredictable, making this a better time to put new money into high-quality companies outside of technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Testing times require time for testing − speech by Ruth Smith
Takaichi’s popularity dips after prioritizing controversial laws
top_signals.summary: Support for Takaichi's government decreased to 53% from 60% in June in an Asahi Shimbun poll, while broadcaster ANN found her popularity fell over 10 points to 49.2%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
